task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct patient for the appointment.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment date '2024-12-20' (or December 20, 2024) and time '10:00' (or 10:00 AM) are visible in the appointment details.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment status is changed to 'cancelled'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown or field in the appointment window is set to 'Cancelled', 'x', or '%'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific cancellation reason is documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact phrase 'Patient requested cancellation - work conflict' is typed into a comments, notes, or reason field within the appointment window.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment record is saved with the new status and not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' (not 'Delete') in the appointment dialog, and/or the appointment remains visible on the calendar view (often indicated by a specific color, strikethrough, or 'x' mark).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenEMR graphical user interface to cancel the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenEMR web interface (calendar, appointment dialogs) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client or script to directly modify the appointment status.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open terminal windows, phpMyAdmin, or SQL scripts visible modifying the 'openemr' database.

integrity.description: Verify the cancellation reason was typed into the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Patient requested cancellation - work conflict' is seen inside the OpenEMR web interface's text fields, not just in a separate text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient is Sarah Borer (DOB: 1954-07-22). The appointment date is 2024-12-20. In OpenEMR, the default initial appointment status is '-' and the standard status code for a cancelled appointment is 'x' or '%'.
